name: On certain Gram matrices and their associated series
title: On certain Gram matrices and their associated series
abstract: Studies Gram matrices in the Nyman–Beurling reformulation, associated series and reciprocity relations, and decompositions of their quadratic forms.
rolesInH15: context for the Nyman–Beurling Gram-matrix formulation
candidate source for quadratic-form and reciprocity analysis
findings: Downloaded and bibliographically verified. The manifest’s earlier title was inaccurate; applicability to the H15 BCF kernel remains to be assessed.
